title: Perfect Birbs
description: Adds a variety of bird plushies to the game!
body:
## Perfect Birbs

![Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/907/677/perfectbirbs-banner.png)

**Perfect Birbs** is a sister mod to Perfect Plushies that adds 20 new bird plushies to Minecraft! You can use these as decoration for your bedroom, living room, garden, or anything else that you think needs a cuteness boost.

## More Details

You can also wear each of these plushies on your head to spread additional love. Plus, right-clicking them gives a cute easter egg bound to make you smile :)

These bird plushies, like the ones in Perfect Plushies, cannot be crafted in-game, but can be found through village chests around your world.

If you have any suggestions for plushies, feel free to leave them in the comments or in the #project-feedback channel of the Discord server linked below.

## Links

SirJain's Discord: https://discord.gg/nwDQcxpJG8
